hero.title: Seg uḥwaǧ n tuqqna ɣer yisekla aɣelnaw
hero.lead: IATF tettɛawan tiddukliwin, tarbaεin, d yimdanen akken ad rren iswiyen n tidet n tuqqna ɣer yisenfaren n ubrid ilelli.
support: Iseḍfaren i yettwaqeblen ttwaseklesen deg tuddsa IATF GitHub ddaw n tlelli n copyleft yerna yettwasnulfa s wudem unnig.

header.title: Abrid n medden kan i uselkim yessawḍen

paragraphs: S usebter, yal yiwen yezmer ad d-yessers ugur n tuqqna ɣer IATF. Ma tezmer terbaεt ad t-teṭṭef, ad yeldi yiwen n usenduq n GitHub i leqdic-nni.
Yal usenfaṛ yettwaqeblen yesεa axxam agdud i usebter, tiɣawsiwin, isefka, d yisenfaren, s usnulfu i d-yettawin deg berra sɣur yiwen n usinegger amesbaṭli.

terms.definition: Ahil n useqdec d wamek ara d-yili deg uxeddim

header.title: Amek i iteddu
header.intro: Asenfar-nni yeqqim d amecṭuḥ akken ad yeshel uḍar n medden ad t-teḍfer.

steps.title: Yettunefk-d usuter
paragraphs: Tiddukla, tarbaεt, neɣ yiwen n umdan yezmer ad d-yefk asuter yebnan ɣef uḥwaǧ n tidet n tuqqna.
Isutren zemren ad bdun seg usmel, s yimayl ɣer contact@iatf.cc, neɣ s umennuɣ.

steps.title: IATF i tt-yettmuqulen
paragraphs: Neḥseb ma yella leqdic-nni yelha i lmendad-is, ma yella d ayen izemren ad yexdem, yerna ma yella ixeddem deg yiwen n usenfaṛ n ubrid ilelli.

steps.title: Yettwasnulfa-d usebter agdud
paragraphs: Ma yettwaqbel usenfaṛ, ad d-yeffeɣ deg tuddsa n GitHub n IATF s yiwet n telɣa n copyleft.
Aḍebsi-a ad yuɣal d axxam agdud n unagraw, tiɣawsiwin, isekkilen, d isefka i d-yettunefken.

steps.title: D amsenǧer i d-yettawin leqdic ɣef usenfaṛ-nni.
paragraphs: Yettunefk-d yiwen n yinegni amesbaṭli i usentel n usenfaṛ, yerna asnulfu yettwaxdem deg umkan n medden.

header.title: Sfeḍ axeddim i yellan akka tura neɣ bdu-d aɣawas n umkan

paragraphs: Seqdec anagraw akken ad teẓreḍ d acu yellan yakan d agdud, neɣ bdu asewwi ma yella kra n wugur n usiweḍ ad yuɣal d asenfaṛ.
